SEARCH
Package client.view

Class ReservationListController.EditFlow

java.lang.Object
client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Enclosing class:
ReservationListController
private final class ReservationListController.EditFlow extends Object
The on-screen reschedule wizard for a single reservation. It takes over the screen (saving the list cards and restoring them on exit) and walks the user through Edit Details → Review → Settlement with a step indicator. On confirm it sends the same UPDATE_RESERVATION the old dialog did, shows the settlement inline, and live-refreshes the list. State for the in-progress edit lives on the instance so it survives the Back/Next step swaps.

    Method

    bodyFor(int idx)
    Selects the body node for a wizard step.

    buildInputs()
    Prefills + configures the step-1 controls from the reservation.

    Returns the step-1 body: date, optional time, and party-size inputs.
    private Label
    fieldLabel(String text)
    Builds a field-label.
    private void
    finish()
    Restores the list view, replacing the wizard.
    private Node
    footerFor(int idx)
    Builds the footer buttons for a step (Cancel/Review, Back/Confirm, or Done).
    private String
    formatVisitTime()
    Converts the 12-hour dropdowns (Hour 1–12, Minute, AM/PM) into the 24-hour HH:mm:ss string the server expects — byte-identical to the Book Visit form: 12 AM → 00, 12 PM → 12, any other PM hour + 12.
    private void
    hideError()
    Hides the inline error message.
    private Label
    hintLabel(String text)
    Builds a wrapping hint label.
    private Button
    primary(String text)
    Builds a primary-styled button.
    private Node
    reviewBody()
    Returns the step-2 body: an old → new comparison of the edited fields.
    private void
    reviewRow(GridPane g, int row, String key, String oldVal, String newVal)
    Adds one "key: old → new" row to the review grid.
    private Button
    secondary(String text)
    Builds a secondary-styled button.
    private Node
    settlementBody()
    Returns the step-3 body: the success line plus any settlement message.
    private void
    showError(String msg)
    Shows an inline error message on the wizard.
    private void
    showStep(int idx)
    Renders the wizard step at the given index (title, indicator, body, footer).
    (package private) void
    start()
    Swaps the wizard in for the list and shows the first step.
    private void
    submit()
    Sends UPDATE_RESERVATION; on success advances to Settlement and refreshes the list, on failure surfaces the server message and stays on Review.
    private boolean
    validateAndCapture()
    Validates step 1 and captures the edited values; same rules as the old dialog (date required, party ≥ 1, time optional → null).

      Renders the wizard step at the given index (title, indicator, body, footer).
      Parameters:
      idx - the zero-based step index

    • bodyFor

      private Node bodyFor(int idx)
      Selects the body node for a wizard step.
      Parameters:
      idx - the zero-based step index
      Returns:
      the body node for that step (details / review / settlement)

      private Node detailsBody()

    • reviewRow

      private void reviewRow(GridPane g, int row, String key, String oldVal, String newVal)
      Adds one "key: old → new" row to the review grid.
      Parameters:
      g - the review grid
      row - the grid row index
      key - the field label
      oldVal - the original value
      newVal - the edited value

    • settlementBody

      private Node settlementBody()
      Returns the step-3 body: the success line plus any settlement message.
      Returns:
      the step-3 body: the success line plus any settlement message

    • footerFor

      private Node footerFor(int idx)
      Builds the footer buttons for a step (Cancel/Review, Back/Confirm, or Done).
      Parameters:
      idx - the zero-based step index
      Returns:
      the footer button row

    • validateAndCapture

      private boolean validateAndCapture()
      Validates step 1 and captures the edited values; same rules as the old dialog (date required, party ≥ 1, time optional → null).
      Returns:
      whether the inputs were valid (and have been captured)

    • formatVisitTime

      private String formatVisitTime()
      Converts the 12-hour dropdowns (Hour 1–12, Minute, AM/PM) into the 24-hour HH:mm:ss string the server expects — byte-identical to the Book Visit form: 12 AM → 00, 12 PM → 12, any other PM hour + 12.
      Returns:
      the selected time as HH:mm:ss

    • submit

      private void submit()
      Sends UPDATE_RESERVATION; on success advances to Settlement and refreshes the list, on failure surfaces the server message and stays on Review.

    • finish

      private void finish()
      Restores the list view, replacing the wizard.
